publishedAbstract: It is now possible to set quota options for object bucket claims (OBC) to avoid resource starvation and increase the usage of the storage provided via bucket. The quota can be set during the OBC creation using the options `maxObjects` and `maxSize` in the custom resource definition (CRD). Also, users can update these options after the OBC creation.
publishedTitle: Quota support for OBC provided by RGW - Developer Preview
